title: OpenUsage Windows Update Feed
description: JSON feed served from gh-pages alongside appcast.xml. Consumed by the Windows shell UpdateChecker stub (Phase 5); production updater (Velopack or WinSparkle) should validate sha256 and Authenticode signatures before applying.

version.description: Release version in the shared 0.7.x line (semver; pre-release suffix allowed for early-access, e.g. 0.7.1-beta.2).

url.description: HTTPS download URL for the installer or self-contained zip published on the GitHub Release.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the download artifact. Required for production updater integrity checks.

channel.description: Update channel. early-access mirrors macOS -beta.N tags.

notes.description: Optional short release notes shown in the update banner.

publishedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this feed entry was published.

minOS.description: Optional minimum Windows build (e.g. 10.0.19041) if the release raises the OS floor.
